channel.title: fast_news_and_leaks Feed (Published)
channel.description: fast_news_and_leaks feed for the AI x Finance product

item.title: The thirst for mindshare in agentic commerce and payments is UNHINGED rn. Everyone knows it will go parabolic. Nobody…
item.description:
The thirst for mindshare in agentic commerce and payments is UNHINGED rn.
Everyone knows it will go parabolic.
Nobody knows when.
Such a weird dynamic.

item.title: Wild. @tryramp gave agents have their own credit cards 💳 They launched "Agent Cards" today. Spend limits. Merchant c…
item.description:
Wild. @tryramp gave agents have their own credit cards 💳
They launched "Agent Cards" today.
Spend limits. Merchant controls. No card numbers exposed. API/MCP/CLI native 😍
---
The crypto crowd is betting agents will skip cards entirely and pay in stablecoins.
They're https://t.co/Qnd0QYtpHW

item.title: Agents with Virtual cards is the meta
item.description: Agents with Virtual cards is the meta
